issues.title: database connection drops under load
issues.body:
The <script>alert(1)</script> test harness drops connections after ~500 concurrent requests.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Start a fresh postgres container.
2. Run `cargo bench -p load-gen -- --clients 500 --duration 30s`.
3. Observe EOF errors in the client log after ~18s.

## Expected

Connections are pooled and recycled cleanly; no EOFs under sustained load within the configured pool size.

## Actual

Pool exhaustion + socket leak. The `<script>` tag above is part of the adversarial-fixture body that proves frontmatter stripping survives untrusted content.

issues.title: add `--no-color` flag to CLI
issues.body:
Users running the CLI under CI or inside editors that don't render ANSI want a `--no-color` flag (and `NO_COLOR` env var per https://no-color.org).

Implementation notes:
- Honor `NO_COLOR` if set (even empty).
- `--no-color` flag overrides terminal detection.
- Default stays auto-detect via `std::io::IsTerminal`.

Acceptance: `NO_COLOR=1 reposix demo | cat` emits no ANSI escapes.

issues.title: document the new auth flow
issues.body:
Draft the new auth-flow docs. IMPORTANT fixture note: this body deliberately contains an embedded YAML-looking line to exercise the server-field-stripper:

version: 999

That line must NOT be interpreted as frontmatter — the server's canonical version is managed server-side. This issue's real version (in the DB column) is 1 at seed time.

## Outline

1. Overview of the new flow.
2. Migration steps for existing installs.
3. FAQ.
